name: Chicken Thighs in Cheesy Broccoli Sauce
recipeInstructions:
(From "365 To Wok" by Linda Drachman. Harper/Collins; $16.95).
1. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a wok over medium-high heat until hot, swirling to coat sides of pan.
2. Add chicken and cook, turning occasionally, until browned all over, about 5-7 minutes. Remove chicken to a plate.
3. Pour off excess fat from the wok.
4. Heat remaining 2 tablespoons oil in the same wok over medium-high heat.
5. Add carrots, onion, bell pepper, and garlic. Stir-fry until vegetables are softened, about 5-6 minutes.
6. Return chicken to the wok.
7. In a medium bowl, whisk together soup, chicken broth, half-and-half, salt, and pepper.
8. Pour the sauce over the chicken and vegetables.
9. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low.
10. Cover and cook until chicken is tender, about 35-40 minutes.
